page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 4 physical cores and 4 vCPUs, yielding a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage or GPU hardware is bundled with this instance type, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core testing placing in the top 25% at 3073.57. However, multi-core performance is more moderate, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores falling into the middle 50% average tier. Tradeoffs are evident in multi-threaded decompression and database operations, where the instance scored in the bottom 25% for bzip3 multi-threaded decompression, PassMark database operations, and Redis SET operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offer stable, predictable compute resources for general-purpose workloads without the overhead of shared-core architectures. Given the lack of local storage and moderate multi-threaded performance, this instance is suited for workloads such as moderate web serving, single-threaded application processing, and general-purpose utility hosting where high-speed local disk I/O is not a primary requirement.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor at 2.7 GHz on a KVM hypervisor. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmarks show strong single-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 25% during stress-ng testing. However, multi-core and memory-bound tasks, such as PassMark database operations and Redis SET operations, fall into the bottom 25% tier. This resource profile offers a balanced, qualitative cost-to-performance ratio for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation without heavy multi-threaded or storage-intensive demands. It is best suited for general-purpose application hosting, moderate web serving, and single-threaded processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and strong single-core performance, suitable for moderate web serving and general workloads.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance offering balanced memory and strong single-core compute performance for general-purpose workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Strong single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 25% of benchmarks
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the configuration
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Suited for general-purpose hosting, single-threaded applications, and moderate web serving
